raw_response_text:
<features>
- Petals are deep maroon/purple with a velvety texture
- Five prominent petals with a slight ruffled or wavy edge
- Central stamens are grouped tightly in a dark purple cluster
- Petals have a gradient from dark maroon at the base to lighter edges
- Flower has a symmetrical, star-like shape with overlapping petals
- No visible yellow or white coloring in petals
</features>

<kb>
- IF [flower has bright yellow petals with a smooth texture and a central dark spot or stripe] THEN [14]
- IF [flower has deep maroon/purple petals with a velvety texture, overlapping petals, and a tightly clustered central stamen] THEN [81]
</kb>

<rule_check>
The Target Image best matches the rule:
- IF [flower has deep maroon/purple petals with a velvety texture, overlapping petals, and a tightly clustered central stamen] THEN [81]
The Target Image does not exhibit the bright yellow petals or central dark spot/stripe associated with label 14. Instead, it aligns with the velvety maroon/purple petals and symmetrical star-like shape seen in label 81.
</rule_check>

<response>81</response>

raw_response_text:
<features>
- Bright yellow petals with a smooth, slightly curved shape
- Three prominent petals with a central cluster of stamens
- Greenish sepals visible at the base
- Distinctive dark yellow-green markings or spots near the center of the petals
- Petals appear slightly ruffled or textured at the edges
</features>

<kb>
- IF [petals are pink/purple with a star-like shape and multiple thin petals] THEN [81]
- IF [petals are bright yellow with three main petals, dark yellow-green central markings, and green sepals] THEN [14]
</kb>

<rule_check>
- The Target Image matches the second rule (IF [petals are bright yellow with three main petals, dark yellow-green central markings, and green sepals] THEN [14]) because it exhibits all the observable features described in the rule: bright yellow petals, three prominent petals, dark yellow-green markings near the center, and green sepals at the base.
</rule_check>

<response>14</response>
